nasb.text: But when the cloud began to rise from the city in a column of smoke, Benjamin looked behind them; and behold, the whole city was going up in smoke to heaven.

esv.text: But when the signal began to rise out of the city in a column of smoke, the Benjaminites looked behind them, and behold, the whole of the city went up in smoke to heaven.

cnv.text: 當煙柱信號從城中上升的時候，便雅憫人就轉身觀看，只見全城煙火沖天。

ccb.text: 这时基比亚城已浓烟滚滚，便雅悯人回头观望，只见全城浓烟四起。
